title: Settings
subtitle: Manage your account settings and preferences.
themeDesc: Switches the entire app, including the login screen.
profileDesc: Your personal information synced from your Google account.
profilePictureDesc: Managed automatically by your connected Google account.
googleOAuthNotice: Your account is currently managed via Google OAuth. To update your name or profile picture, please make the changes directly in your Google account settings.
paymentFullDesc: Provide your payment options so other trip members can settle up with you easily.
preferredChannelDesc: Select which channel is shown to other users for settlements (only one can be active).
promptpayIdHint: Your mobile number or citizen ID linked to PromptPay.
uploadQrHint: PNG, JPG, or WEBP up to 5MB
errorQrRead: Failed to read QR image file
errorBankPartial: All three bank fields (Bank Name, Account Number, and Account Holder Name) must be filled, or all left empty.
errorBankIncomplete: Cannot select Mobile Banking as preferred channel because bank details are incomplete.
errorPromptpayIncomplete: Cannot select PromptPay as preferred channel because PromptPay details are incomplete. Please provide an ID or QR Code.
warnBankIncomplete: Please fill in all Mobile Banking fields before saving.
warnPromptpayIncomplete: Please provide a PromptPay ID or upload a QR Code image before saving.
